TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: u cacay a tatama i Yin-ni , ci Aldi ku ngangan nida, misakakawaw i balunga mahida u mibutingay a pubu sademidemiad cinida, u kawaw nida mulikat tu cilul papatakaw tu buting. u tawki ci Aldi, micunus tu kakanen,nananuman atu simal pilipilipayan, hani kelid hantu nicalaan tu buting i pubu. nika, i pituway a bulad sabaw sepat a demiad, idaw ku tabakiay a bali, malebut nu bali ku layic nu pubu, sisa mapalit tu sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa a demiad i bayu' cinida, matalaw mapatay nu ngalay atu mapatay nu ngaluh, buting satu i bayu' sapakabecul cinidaan, matalaw tu sienaw, tastasen nida ku sapad nu balunga, tuduhen nida mingidu, u duma lusasaen nida tu dikuc ku nanum nu bayu' a minanum, kya cay tu kaahecid ku nanum nu bayu'. sadikuday mapalit satu tayda i Kwan-taw śĶ∑Śüü, maala nu mibutingay a balunga nu Pa-na-ma , taluma' satu cinida i nyadu'.
S.PHON: u ¶a ¶aj a tatama i jin-ni , ¶i ar~…ĺdi ku ŇčaŇčan nida, misakakawaw i bar~…ĺuŇča mańßida u mibutiŇčaj a pubu sad…ômid…ômiad ¶inida, u kawaw nida mur~…ĺikat tu ¶ir~…ĺur~…ĺ papatakaw tu butiŇč. u tawki ¶i ar~…ĺdi, mi ¶unus tu kakan…ôn,nananuman atu simar~…ĺ pir~…ĺipir~…ĺipajan, ńßani k…ôr~…ĺid ńßantu ni ¶ar~…ĺaan tu butiŇč i pubu. nika, i pituwaj a bur~…ĺad sabaw s…ôpat a d…ômiad, idaw ku tabakiaj a bar~…ĺi, mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu bar~…ĺi ku r~…ĺaji ¶ nu pubu, sisa mapar~…ĺit tu s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku siwa a d…ômiad i baju Ē~ ° ¶inida, matar~…ĺaw mapataj nu Ňčar~…ĺaj atu mapataj nu Ňčar~…ĺuńß, butiŇč satu i baju Ē~ ° sapakab…ô ¶ur~…ĺ ¶inidaan, matar~…ĺaw tu si…ônaw, tastas…ôn nida ku sapad nu bar~…ĺuŇča, tuduńß…ôn nida miŇčidu, u duma r~…ĺusasa…ôn nida tu diku ¶ ku nanum nu baju Ē~ ° a minanum, kja ¶aj tu kaańß…ô ¶id ku nanum nu baju Ē~ °. sadikudaj mapar~…ĺit satu tajda i kwan-taw **, maar~…ĺa nu mibutiŇčaj a bar~…ĺuŇča nu pa-na-ma , tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satu ¶inida i njadu Ē~ °.
S.FORM: u cacay a tatama i Yin-ni , ci Aldi ku ngangan nida, misakakawaw i balunga mahida u mibutingay a pubu sademidemiad cinida, u kawaw nida mulikat tu cilul papatakaw tu buting. u tawki ci Aldi, micunus tu kakanen,nananuman atu simal pilipilipayan, hani kelid hantu nicalaan tu buting i pubu. nika, i pituway a bulad sabaw sepat a demiad, idaw ku tabakiay a bali, malebut nu bali ku layic nu pubu, sisa mapalit tu sepat a bataan idaw ku siwa a demiad i bayu' cinida, matalaw mapatay nu ngalay atu mapatay nu ngaluh, buting satu i bayu' sapakabecul cinidaan, matalaw tu sienaw, tastasen nida ku sapad nu balunga, tuduhen nida mingidu, u duma lusasaen nida tu dikuc ku nanum nu bayu' a minanum, kya cay tu kaahecid ku nanum nu bayu'. sadikuday mapalit satu tayda i Kwan-taw śĶ∑Śüü, maala nu mibutingay a balunga nu Pa-na-ma , taluma' satu cinida i nyadu'.
S.PHON: u ¶a ¶aj a tatama i jin-ni , ¶i ar~…ĺdi ku ŇčaŇčan nida, misakakawaw i bar~…ĺuŇča mańßida u mibutiŇčaj a pubu sad…ômid…ômiad ¶inida, u kawaw nida mur~…ĺikat tu ¶ir~…ĺur~…ĺ papatakaw tu butiŇč. u tawki ¶i ar~…ĺdi, mi ¶unus tu kakan…ôn,nananuman atu simar~…ĺ pir~…ĺipir~…ĺipajan, ńßani k…ôr~…ĺid ńßantu ni ¶ar~…ĺaan tu butiŇč i pubu. nika, i pituwaj a bur~…ĺad sabaw s…ôpat a d…ômiad, idaw ku tabakiaj a bar~…ĺi, mar~…ĺ…ôbut nu bar~…ĺi ku r~…ĺaji ¶ nu pubu, sisa mapar~…ĺit tu s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku siwa a d…ômiad i baju Ē~ ° ¶inida, matar~…ĺaw mapataj nu Ňčar~…ĺaj atu mapataj nu Ňčar~…ĺuńß, butiŇč satu i baju Ē~ ° sapakab…ô ¶ur~…ĺ ¶inidaan, matar~…ĺaw tu si…ônaw, tastas…ôn nida ku sapad nu bar~…ĺuŇča, tuduńß…ôn nida miŇčidu, u duma r~…ĺusasa…ôn nida tu diku ¶ ku nanum nu baju Ē~ ° a minanum, kja ¶aj tu kaańß…ô ¶id ku nanum nu baju Ē~ °. sadikudaj mapar~…ĺit satu tajda i kwan-taw **, maar~…ĺa nu mibutiŇčaj a bar~…ĺuŇča nu pa-na-ma , tar~…ĺuma Ē~ ° satu ¶inida i njadu Ē~ °.
